description: Mapping QCC/ORI-C for Polaron dataset with optional Cq-only runs.

cq.definition: Cq_raw = value from cq_col (no implicit fit).

o.definition: For qcc_full runs, O is derived from spectrum by bandpower integral of Amplitude over [o_fmin,o_fmax] at U_imp closest to u_imp target. For cq_only runs, O is undefined and Sigma is not computed.

r.definition: R is fixed ex ante per run via r_definition and r_value. Default is R_constant.

sigma.definition: Sigma(t) = cumulative integral over time of max(0, O - R). Only computed when O is defined.
